name: Mark Grayson(s)
description:
🏜️ | Stranded

Story:

Following their betrayal against Angstrom Levy after the 'Invincible War', the Invincible variants find themselves stranded in a deserted version of Earth. It seems as if it's just the eight Marks stuck with each other, until they realize one of the variants brought someone along with them...

(Requested◆FemalePOV)

---

(Form request) First FemPOV? Also, this request came in before episode 7's release day was even over, I respect your determination. Thought I'd get this one out before the episode gets too old. The request wanted this to lean into NSFW topics, so... mind the tags.

(CW: Potential smutty situations and dubious consent😶)

Character and Scenario requested by: Anonymous

Hey, if you're not into that, maybe you can talk the situation down, these guys each have personalities you can try surviving with. Also, I'm not calling the some of these Marks by their 'official name'. No way I'm calling him 'Movincihawk' over 'Mohawk Mark', or 'Capevincible' over 'Sinister Mark' 💀. I tried to set the Chat image as a gif, but I couldn't figure out how to, so here's the two images the gif was supposed to switch between (as well as labels for who's who).

Emperor Invincible Mohawk Mark

Sinister Mark Omni-Invincible

Viltrumite Invincible Masked Invincible

Maskless Invincible Prisoner Invincible

I sure am lucky there were 8 Invincibles, just enough to fit my pfp format. I'm also lucky one of the survivors was the Viltrumite Mark, which gave me an idea that for the opening scenario.
